style_prompt: A panel from a medieval embroidered tapestry in the style of the Bayeux Tapestry, depicting an anachronistic modern subject with complete sincerity. Woven wool threads on warm cream linen; deep navy, rust red, gold ochre, and sage green threads; visible stitch direction and couching; flat medieval perspective; decorative top and bottom borders with small heraldic beasts and thread motifs; figures in the naive romanesque style of eleventh-century embroidery. No letters, no words, no inscriptions anywhere.
image_prompt: Clerks in tunics carry armfuls of paper scrolls back and forth between many tall, crumbling stone towers spread across the panel; each tower has a different odd shape and patched walls; long winding paths of golden thread connect the clerks' journeys; one clerk wipes his brow.
composed_prompt:
A panel from a medieval embroidered tapestry in the style of the Bayeux Tapestry, depicting an anachronistic modern subject with complete sincerity. Woven wool threads on warm cream linen; deep navy, rust red, gold ochre, and sage green threads; visible stitch direction and couching; flat medieval perspective; decorative top and bottom borders with small heraldic beasts and thread motifs; figures in the naive romanesque style of eleventh-century embroidery. No letters, no words, no inscriptions anywhere.

Scene: Clerks in tunics carry armfuls of paper scrolls back and forth between many tall, crumbling stone towers spread across the panel; each tower has a different odd shape and patched walls; long winding paths of golden thread connect the clerks' journeys; one clerk wipes his brow.
